items.title: Total Patients in Enclave
items.tooltipTitle: Total Patients in the N3C Data Enclave
items.tooltipContent: Total Number of Individual Persons within the N3C Data Enclave.

items.title: Total Patients in View
items.tooltipContent:
Total Number of Individuals within the view who have Diabetes indicated in their EHR.

Even without filters, this total may be less than the total number of Diabetic patients within the Enclave due to the suppression of counts less than 20.

items.title: Total COVID+ Patients in View
items.tooltipContent:
COVID+ Defined As:
  • Laboratory-confirmed positive COVID-19 PCR or Antigen test
  • (or) Laboratory-confirmed positive COVID-19 Antibody test
  • (or) Medical visit in which the ICD-10 code for COVID-19 (U07.1) was recorded

items.title: Total Long COVID Patients in View
items.tooltipTitle: Total Long COVID Patients in View
items.tooltipContent:
Long COVID Defined As: any patient having the ICD-10 code for PASC (U09.9) within their EHR.

Note: The ICD-10 for PASC (U09.9) was not created until October 1, 2021, and any data using this code will be limited to after this date.

items.title: Total Vaccinated Patients in View
items.tooltipContent: Vaccination Defined As: any patient having at least one dose of Pfizer, Moderna, or Johnson & Johnson COVID-19 vaccines within their EHR.

items.title: Total Mortalities in View
items.tooltipContent:
Mortality Defined As:
  • Any patient with a date of death in the Enclave
  • (or) Any patient from a mortality-linked PPRL site who exists in one of the external sources (e.g., Government data with death certificates, ObituaryData.com, and obituary data from private sources)
Note: this metric is distinct from the Mortality category associated with Severity, as it does not limit deaths to only those suspected to be caused by COVID-19.
